tools.name: transfer_to_human
tools.description: Warm-transfer the live call to Ahmad's mobile (647-581-3182) for Level-3 issues or whenever the caller explicitly asks for a human. ElevenLabs handles the actual SIP transfer natively — this tool fires the post-decision side-effect (logging + ticket creation) so we have a record. Always pre-announce to the caller before calling: 'I'm warming up the line, please hold for about twenty seconds.'

reason.description: Short reason for transfer, e.g. 'suspected ransomware', 'caller requested human', 'L3 server issue'.

urgency.description: How urgently Ahmad needs to respond.

summary.description: 1–2 sentence summary of what the caller said.

tools.name: create_support_ticket
tools.description: Create a support ticket in our system. Use when transfer fails, when caller wants a callback, or at the end of every successful call to log what was resolved.

status.description: Use 'resolved' when ARIA fixed it on the call.

tools.name: send_sms_followup
tools.description: Send a text message to the caller with a summary of what was discussed, useful links, or the support phone number. Use at the end of most calls — improves perceived quality.

body.description: Text message body, max 1000 chars. Keep it warm and concise.

tools.name: lookup_caller_history
tools.description: Optionally call this early in the conversation if the caller's number is known. Returns prior tickets / known company. Use to personalize ('Welcome back — last time we sorted out the Outlook issue, right?'). If this returns nothing, just proceed normally.

post_call_webhook.description: Fires when each call ends. Sends transcript + classification + tool-call log to ahmad.wasee@iisupp.net via Resend.
